name: Leslie Friedman's Peach Pizza
recipeIngredient: 3 Tablespoons Ice Water or enough to form a dough
recipeInstructions:
Make pastry by blending flour, sugar, salt, butter and ice water. Form dough into a disk, chill it wrapped in plastic wrap for 30 minutes. Roll out the chilled dough into a big circle or rectangle. Place the dough on a baking sheet and turn up the edge to form a shallow rim. Chill the dough for an additional 30 minutes.
Chop almonds and mix with 2 tablespoons flour and 2 tablespoons sugar. Sprinkle this mixture over the chilled dough.
Cut enough peaches into thin slices to cover the dough in one layer, arranged in an attractive overlapping pattern on top of the dough.
Bake at 375°F for 30 minutes or until the crust is golden.
